title: Speak Life: A Believer's Guide to the Power of Words
summary: Have you ever paused to consider the weight of your words? This devotion explores how the words we speak carry the power of life and death.
content:
The Language of the Believer

Have you ever paused to truly listen to your own words? Most people speak without first considering the impact of what they are about to say. We are far more likely to cause harm when we speak impulsively and without intention.

"I tell you, on the Day of Judgment people will give account for every careless word they speak, for by your words you will be justified, and by your words you will be condemned." — Matthew 12:36–37

The Standard: Gracious Speech

"Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt, so that you may know how you ought to answer each person." — Colossians 4:6

Gracious speech is intentional speech. It is speech that considers the listener, weighs the moment, and chooses words that bring life.

Speaking Life in Difficult Seasons

The tongue has the power of death and the power of life. Every day, with every sentence, every confession, every prayer, you are choosing which power to release.

"Death and life are in the power of the tongue, and those who love it will eat its fruits." — Proverbs 18:21

If you want life — speak life.

Shalom. 🕊
